1.title: Toy Story (1995)
1.plot_summary: A toy cowboy named Woody becomes jealous when a new toy named Buzz Lightyear becomes his owner's favorite toy. Woody and Buzz must put aside their differences and work together to get back to their owner.
1.visual_style: Colorful computer-generated animation with detailed character designs and environments.

2.title: Jumanji (1995)
2.plot_summary: A young boy named Alan Parrish finds a mysterious board game called Jumanji in the attic of his new home and releases two jungle creatures and a hunter who have been trapped inside the game for 26 years.

2752.plot_summary: A wealthy family's daughter is kidnapped and the family hires a private investigator to find her but the investigator's methods are unorthodox and the family's dynamics are put to the test.
2752.visual_style: A mix of dark and comedic elements with a focus on the investigator's unorthodox methods.

2753.title: Bedroom Window, The (1987)
2753.plot_summary: A young woman is stalked by a mysterious man in her apartment building after she witnesses a murder.
2753.visual_style: Dark and gritty cinematography with a focus on close-ups and shadows.

2754.title: Deadtime Stories (1987)
2754.plot_summary: A group of teenagers are stalked and killed by a mysterious figure in a series of gruesome and supernatural events.
2754.visual_style: Dark and foreboding settings with a focus on practical effects to create a sense of realism.

2755.title: Light of Day (1987)
2755.plot_summary: A young musician Nick Hurley must choose between his love of rock music and his family's expectations in 1960s New York City.
2755.target_audience: Young adults and adults who enjoy music and coming-of-age stories
2755.visual_style: A gritty and realistic portrayal of 1960s New York City with a focus on the city's music scene

2756.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive (1987)
2756.plot_summary: A tough-as-nails bounty hunter is hired to track down a ruthless outlaw who has stolen a valuable briefcase containing a powerful computer chip.
2756.visual_style: High-octane action sequences and gritty urban landscapes

2757.title: Frances (1982)
2757.plot_summary: Frances is a young woman struggling to cope with her mother's death and her own identity. She embarks on a journey of self-discovery and healing.
2757.visual_style: A muted color palette and natural lighting create a somber and introspective atmosphere.

2758.title: Plenty (1985)
2758.plot_summary: A young couple's relationship is put to the test when they decide to adopt a child and the mother becomes pregnant at the same time.
2758.visual_style: A mix of realistic and stylized cinematography with a focus on the emotional intimacy of the characters.

2759.title: Dick (1999)
2759.plot_summary: High school student Dave Kovic is a lookalike for the President of the United States and is hired to impersonate him for a week but things get complicated when the real President suffers a stroke.
2759.visual_style: The film features a mix of dark and light tones with a blend of satire and comedy.

2760.title: Gambler, The (A Játékos) (1997)
2760.plot_summary: A man becomes a high-stakes gambler and loses everything, including his family, in his pursuit of winning big.
2760.visual_style: A gritty and realistic portrayal of the darker side of human nature.

2761.title: Iron Giant, The (1999)
2761.plot_summary: A young boy befriends a giant robot from outer space who is on the run from the military and learns valuable lessons about humanity and acceptance.
2761.visual_style: A mix of traditional animation and computer-generated imagery with a nostalgic feel reminiscent of classic cartoons.

2762.title: Sixth Sense, The (1999)
2762.plot_summary: A young boy communicates with spirits who died in the past, and must use the messages he receives from them to save a woman's life.
2762.visual_style: A mix of dark and muted colors with a focus on shadows and lighting to create a sense of unease.

2763.title: Thomas Crown Affair, The (1999)
2763.plot_summary: Insurance agent John T. Hallam is hired to investigate a theft at a high-stakes poker game where a valuable painting was stolen. He teams up with a beautiful and sophisticated art dealer to uncover the truth behind the theft.
2763.visual_style: A visually stunning and stylish film with a blend of high-end fashion and sleek cinematography.

2764.title: Thomas Crown Affair, The (1968)
2764.plot_summary: A wealthy businessman is suspected of embezzling millions of dollars from his company and is blackmailed by a mysterious woman who has evidence of his crime.
2764.visual_style: A stylish and sophisticated visual style with a focus on high-end fashion and luxury settings.

2765.title: Acid House, The (1998)
2765.plot_summary: The film follows a group of young people in the UK who become involved in the acid house movement of the late 1980s and early 1990s. As they get deeper into the scene they face the consequences of their actions.
2765.visual_style: The film features a vibrant and colorful visual style that captures the energy and excitement of the acid house movement.

2766.title: Adventures of Sebastian Cole, The (1998)
2766.plot_summary: Sebastian Cole is a young man who is struggling to find his place in the world after being kicked out of his home by his mother. He moves to New York City and becomes involved in a relationship with a man named Harlan.
2766.visual_style: The film features a mix of vibrant colors and eclectic production design.

2767.title: Illuminata (1998)
2767.plot_summary: A struggling artist becomes involved with a wealthy woman who is dying of cancer and her eccentric family.
2767.visual_style: A mix of vibrant colors and dark undertones reflecting the characters' emotional states.

2768.title: Stiff Upper Lips (1998)
2768.plot_summary: A group of British upper-class women in the 19th century are forced to flee their homes and take on new identities to avoid being sent to the workhouse.
2768.visual_style: period drama with a comedic tone

2769.title: Yards, The (1999)
2769.plot_summary: A former baseball player turned hitman is forced to go on the run after a job goes wrong and he is double-crossed by his employer.
2769.visual_style: A gritty and realistic visual style with a focus on handheld camera work and natural lighting.

2770.title: Bowfinger (1999)
2770.plot_summary: A struggling filmmaker Bobby Bowfinger tries to make a movie about a famous actor Jiffy Gilchrist without his knowledge or consent by following him around and filming him in his daily life.
2770.visual_style: a mix of handheld camera work and mockumentary style

2771.title: Brokedown Palace (1999)
2771.plot_summary: Two American women travel to Thailand and get caught up in a heroin smuggling operation.
2771.visual_style: A mix of vibrant colors and gritty realism.

2772.title: Detroit Rock City (1999)
2772.plot_summary: Four friends from New York City travel to Detroit to see KISS in concert and experience the city's punk rock scene.
2772.visual_style: A mix of documentary and comedy styles with a focus on the punk rock aesthetic of the 1970s.

2773.title: Alice and Martin (Alice et Martin) (1998)
2773.plot_summary: Alice and Martin is a romantic drama that tells the story of two people who meet by chance and fall in love despite their different backgrounds and personalities. They must navigate their relationship and confront their own insecurities and fears.
2773.visual_style: The film features a muted color palette and a mix of close-ups and long takes to create an intimate and emotional atmosphere.

2774.title: Better Than Chocolate (1999)
2774.plot_summary: A young woman discovers she has the ability to make chocolate that can change people's lives and she uses this gift to help those in need.
2774.visual_style: A mix of vibrant colors and whimsical settings

2775.title: Head On (1998)
2775.plot_summary: A young woman with a troubled past struggles to cope with her emotions and find love in a small Australian coastal town.
2775.visual_style: A mix of natural and intimate cinematography captures the beauty of the Australian coastline and the complexity of the characters' emotions.

2776.title: Marcello Mastroianni: I Remember Yes, I Remember (1997)
2776.plot_summary: Marcello Mastroianni: I Remember Yes I Remember is a documentary film that explores the life and career of Italian actor Marcello Mastroianni through interviews with him and those who knew him.
2776.target_audience: adults interested in film history and Italian culture
2776.visual_style: black and white footage of Marcello Mastroianni's film career intercut with interviews

2777.title: Cobra (1925)
2777.plot_summary: A young woman is accused of murdering her husband and must defend herself in court with the help of a lawyer who becomes her love interest.
2777.visual_style: A black and white silent film with a focus on dramatic lighting and camera angles.

2778.title: Never Talk to Strangers (1995)
2778.plot_summary: A young woman meets a charming stranger who turns out to be a serial killer and she must fight for her life.
2778.visual_style: A dark and ominous tone with a focus on close-ups and quick cuts to create tension.

2779.title: Heaven Can Wait (1978)
2779.plot_summary: Joe Pendleton a small time crook is murdered by his business partner and is given a second chance on earth as a wealthy businessman and must adjust to his new life and find a way to get back to heaven.
2779.visual_style: A mix of comedy and drama with a focus on the visual contrast between Joe's old and new lives.

2780.title: Raven, The (1963)
2780.plot_summary: A young girl named Ellen is sent to live with her aunt and uncle in the countryside where she discovers a mysterious raven that seems to be a harbinger of doom.
2780.visual_style: A mix of live-action and animation with a blend of realistic and fantastical elements.

2781.title: Tingler, The (1959)
2781.plot_summary: A man is terrorized by a mysterious force that causes him to feel a tingling sensation in his fingers and toes.
2781.visual_style: Black and white cinematography with a focus on shadows and lighting to create a sense of unease.

2782.title: Pit and the Pendulum (1961)
2782.plot_summary: In this film a man is captured by the Spanish Inquisition and subjected to various forms of torture including the pit and the pendulum.
2782.visual_style: The film features a dark and atmospheric visual style with a focus on shadows and lighting.

2783.title: Tomb of Ligeia, The (1965)
2783.plot_summary: The film is a dark and atmospheric tale of a man who is haunted by the memory of his deceased wife Ligeia and becomes obsessed with her tomb.
2783.visual_style: The film features a blend of Gothic and atmospheric visuals with a focus on dark colors and eerie settings.

2784.title: Masque of the Red Death, The (1964)
2784.plot_summary: Prince Prospero holds a masquerade ball in his abbey while the plague rages outside but he is unaware that the Red Death is among the guests.
2784.visual_style: a dark and eerie atmosphere with a focus on shadows and lighting

2785.title: Tales of Terror (1962)
2785.plot_summary: Tales of Terror is a 1962 American television film that features three separate stories each based on a classic Edgar Allan Poe tale. The film is a horror anthology that showcases the darker side of human nature.
2785.visual_style: The film features a blend of black and white cinematography and a mix of Gothic and Victorian-era settings.

2786.title: Haunted Honeymoon (1986)
2786.plot_summary: A couple on their honeymoon in a remote cabin are terrorized by a killer who is using the cabin as a hunting ground.
2786.visual_style: Low budget special effects and a mix of slapstick humor and horror elements

2787.title: Cat's Eye (1985)
2787.plot_summary: Three young girls discover a mysterious antique locket that unleashes a supernatural force that threatens their lives.
2787.visual_style: A mix of dark and eerie settings with a blend of supernatural and realistic elements.

2788.title: And Now for Something Completely Different (1971)
2788.plot_summary: A series of sketches based on the works of Monty Python's Graham Chapman and John Cleese are presented in a mock documentary style.
2788.visual_style: A mix of live-action and animation is used to bring the sketches to life.

2789.title: Damien: Omen II (1978)
2789.plot_summary: Damien the Antichrist continues to wreak havoc on the world after the events of the first film. Damien's powers grow stronger as he becomes more aware of his destiny.
2789.visual_style: A dark and ominous tone with a focus on suspense and horror elements.

2790.title: Final Conflict, The (a.k.a. Omen III: The Final Conflict) (1981)
2790.plot_summary: The final installment of the Omen series follows Damien Thorn as he becomes the Antichrist and must be stopped by a group of people who know his true identity.
2790.visual_style: A dark and ominous tone is set with a focus on the use of shadows and lighting to create a sense of foreboding.

2791.title: Airplane! (1980)
2791.plot_summary: Rusty a bumbling air traffic controller is mistakenly put in charge of air traffic control at Los Angeles International Airport during a major air show.

2793.title: American Werewolf in Paris, An (1997)
2793.plot_summary: Two American tourists in Paris are attacked by a werewolf and one of them is bitten. The bitten man must navigate his new condition and the woman who helped him.
2793.visual_style: A mix of dark and comedic elements with a blend of horror and slapstick humor.

2794.title: European Vacation (1985)
2794.plot_summary: Clark Griswold a well-meaning but hapless family man sets out to take his family on a European vacation but things don't go as planned.
2794.visual_style: colorful and vibrant visuals of European landmarks and scenery

2795.title: Vacation (1983)
2795.plot_summary: Clark Griswold is a well-meaning but hapless family man who embarks on a disastrous road trip to Walley World with his family.
2795.visual_style: colorful and vibrant visuals with a mix of outdoor and indoor settings

2796.title: Funny Farm (1988)
2796.plot_summary: A group of misfits buy a farm and try to make a living from it but their plans are constantly thwarted by the farm's eccentricities and their own ineptitude.
2796.visual_style: A mix of slapstick humor and colorful farm settings.

2797.title: Big (1988)
2797.plot_summary: A young boy makes a wish to be big and wakes up the next morning to find himself in the body of an adult.
2797.visual_style: A mix of live-action and puppetry with a blend of fantasy and realism.

2798.title: Problem Child (1990)
2798.plot_summary: Junior is a mischievous and troublesome 13-year-old boy who is sent to a reform school after getting kicked out of several schools for his antics. He is sent to live with his father a wealthy businessman who is trying to discipline him.
2798.visual_style: a mix of slapstick comedy and witty one-liners

2799.title: Problem Child 2 (1991)
2799.plot_summary: Junior is back and this time he is in the 4th grade. He is still a problem child and gets into all sorts of trouble.

2800.title: Little Nemo: Adventures in Slumberland (1992)
2800.plot_summary: Little Nemo is a young boy who falls asleep and enters the world of Slumberland where he must face his fears and outwit the villainous King Morpheus to return home.
2800.visual_style: Vibrant and imaginative animation with a mix of realistic and fantastical elements.

2801.title: Oscar and Lucinda (a.k.a. Oscar & Lucinda) (1997)
2801.plot_summary: Oscar and Lucinda is a story about a young Irishman who falls in love with a woman who is a devout Christian and a gambler. They embark on a journey to the New Mexico desert to build a glass church.
2801.visual_style: The film features a mix of sweeping desert landscapes and intimate close-ups, creating a dreamlike atmosphere.

2802.title: Tequila Sunrise (1988)
2802.plot_summary: A US Navy pilot is stranded in Mexico after a crash landing and becomes embroiled in a love affair with a local woman and a smuggling operation.
2802.visual_style: A mix of vibrant colors and gritty realism captures the sun-kissed Mexican landscape and the gritty underbelly of the smuggling operation.

2803.title: Pelican Brief, The (1993)
2803.plot_summary: A young lawyer named Darby Shaw writes a brief that accuses three Supreme Court justices of a murder conspiracy and becomes the target of a hitman.
2803.visual_style: fast-paced and suspenseful with a mix of courtroom drama and action sequences

2804.title: Christmas Story, A (1983)
2804.plot_summary: A young boy named Ralphie Parker wants a Red Ryder BB gun for Christmas but faces obstacles from his parents and a bully named Scut Farkas.
2804.visual_style: A nostalgic and colorful depiction of 1940s Indiana with a mix of realistic and stylized elements.

2805.title: Mickey Blue Eyes (1999)
2805.plot_summary: Mickey Blue Eyes is a comedy about a young man who is mistaken for a hitman and must clear his name while navigating a complex web of relationships.
2805.visual_style: The film features a mix of witty dialogue and colorful visuals.

2806.title: Teaching Mrs. Tingle (1999)
2806.plot_summary: High school student Paul Harper is forced to take a series of creative writing assignments from his teacher Mrs Tingle who is known for her sadistic and manipulative behavior. Paul and his friends devise a plan to fake her death and collect the reward money.
2806.visual_style: A dark and satirical tone with a focus on the absurdity of high school life.

2807.title: Universal Soldier: The Return (1999)
2807.plot_summary: Luc Deveraux a former US soldier is brought back to life using secret government technology and must fight against his former comrades who have been turned into super-soldiers.
2807.visual_style: High-octane action sequences and sci-fi elements

2808.title: Universal Soldier (1992)
2808.plot_summary: Luc Deveraux a US soldier is cryogenically frozen and thawed out years later to be used as a super soldier in a secret government program but he soon discovers he has no memory of his past and is forced to fight against his former comrades.
2808.visual_style: High-octane action sequences and sci-fi elements are combined with a gritty and intense visual style.

2809.title: Love Stinks (1999)
2809.plot_summary: A man hires a private investigator to track down his cheating girlfriend but the PI turns out to be an undercover cop who is also after her.
2809.visual_style: A mix of dark and light tones with a focus on the comedic aspects of the story.

2810.title: Perfect Blue (1997)
2810.plot_summary: Mima Kirigoe a pop idol who decides to leave her group to pursue an acting career but struggles to cope with the pressures of fame and her own identity.
2810.visual_style: A mix of traditional animation and computer-generated imagery with a muted color palette and distorted visuals.

2811.title: With Friends Like These... (1998)
2811.plot_summary: A group of friends reunite for a weekend in the country and their relationships are put to the test.
2811.visual_style: A mix of handheld camera work and static shots to create a sense of realism.

2812.title: In Too Deep (1999)
2812.plot_summary: A former cop turned bounty hunter is hired to track down a fugitive but finds himself in over his head when he gets caught up in a complex web of crime and corruption.
2812.visual_style: fast-paced and suspenseful with a gritty urban aesthetic

2813.title: Source, The (1999)
2813.plot_summary: The film explores the life of Don DeLillo's novel of the same name through a series of interviews with the author and other experts.
2813.visual_style: A mix of interviews and archival footage

2814.title: Bat, The (1959)
2814.plot_summary: A young boy is terrorized by a bat that is actually a witch in disguise. The boy must find a way to defeat the witch and save his family.
2814.visual_style: Black and white film with a mix of dark and eerie lighting

2815.title: Iron Eagle (1986)
2815.plot_summary: A young Air Force pilot is sent to a US military prison for the crime of stealing a jet and planning to rescue his father who is being held in a Soviet prison.
2815.visual_style: High-octane aerial action sequences and intense hand-to-hand combat

2816.title: Iron Eagle II (1988)
2816.plot_summary: A former Air Force pilot is recruited to rescue a U.S. pilot shot down over Libya and held captive by a group of terrorists.
2816.visual_style: High-octane action sequences and aerial stunts

2817.title: Aces: Iron Eagle III (1992)
2817.plot_summary: Aces: Iron Eagle III is a 1992 American action war film directed by Sidney J. Furie and starring Louis Gossett Jr. and Julie Michaels. The film follows a young boy who is kidnapped by a group of terrorists and must be rescued by a former Air Force pilot.
2817.target_audience: Teenagers and adults who enjoy action and war movies
2817.visual_style: The film features a mix of aerial combat and ground-based action sequences with a focus on high-octane action and suspense.

2818.title: Iron Eagle IV (1995)
2818.plot_summary: A young boy named Doug Masters is kidnapped by a group of terrorists and his father, a former Air Force pilot, must use his flying skills to rescue him.
2818.visual_style: High-octane action sequences and aerial stunts

2819.title: Three Days of the Condor (1975)
2819.plot_summary: A CIA analyst is framed for murder and must clear his name while uncovering a conspiracy within the agency.
2819.visual_style: A gritty and realistic portrayal of 1970s New York City.

2820.title: Hamlet (1964)
2820.plot_summary: Prince Hamlet seeks to avenge his fathers death by feigning madness and manipulating those around him to uncover the truth about his fathers murder.
2820.visual_style: a mix of traditional and modern elements with a focus on dramatic lighting and shadows

2821.title: Male and Female (1919)
2821.plot_summary: A young man and woman from different social classes fall in love in a small town in the early 20th century.

2822.title: Medicine Man (1992)
2822.plot_summary: Dr. Loomis is a scientist who travels to the Amazon rainforest in search of a cure for cancer and discovers a plant with extraordinary healing properties. However, he must navigate the challenges of the jungle and the local people to unlock its secrets.
2822.visual_style: The film features lush and vibrant cinematography of the Amazon rainforest, with a mix of sweeping aerial shots and intimate close-ups.

2823.title: Spiders, The (Die Spinnen, 1. Teil: Der Goldene See) (1919)
2823.plot_summary: A man is accused of murdering his wife and must clear his name with the help of a detective.
2823.visual_style: Black and white film with a focus on shadows and lighting to create a sense of tension.

2824.title: On the Ropes (1999)
2824.plot_summary: Boxers from the streets of New York City fight for a chance to compete in the Golden Gloves tournament.
2824.visual_style: Raw and unpolished footage captures the gritty reality of street boxing.

2825.title: Rosie (1998)
2825.plot_summary: Rosie is a young woman who is struggling to cope with her mother's death and her own feelings of guilt and responsibility.
2825.visual_style: The film features a muted color palette and a mix of close-ups and long shots to convey the emotional intensity of the characters.

2826.title: 13th Warrior, The (1999)
2826.plot_summary: A group of Viking warriors are sent to England to fight a mysterious enemy that is terrorizing the land. They must use their battle skills to survive and uncover the truth behind the enemy's power.
2826.visual_style: The film features a gritty and realistic depiction of medieval combat and a muted color palette.

2827.title: Astronaut's Wife, The (1999)
2827.plot_summary: Astronaut John Grady's wife is murdered and he is accused of the crime but he is actually being framed by a mysterious figure from his past.
2827.visual_style: A mix of dark and muted colors with a focus on creating a sense of unease and tension.

2828.title: Dudley Do-Right (1999)
2828.plot_summary: Nell Fenwick hires Dudley Do-Right to escort her to the Yukon to meet her uncle. However, the villainous Snidely Whiplash is also after her.
2828.visual_style: A cartoonish and colorful visual style with exaggerated characters and settings.

2829.title: Muse, The (1999)
2829.plot_summary: A young woman with a troubled past becomes a muse for a famous artist and helps him find inspiration for his next painting.
2829.visual_style: Vibrant colors and expressive brushstrokes bring the artist's imagination to life.

2830.title: Cabaret Balkan (Bure Baruta) (1998)
2830.plot_summary: In a rundown Belgrade apartment building, a group of people from different walks of life intersect and collide in a series of vignettes that explore the human condition.
2830.visual_style: A muted color palette and stark lighting create a visually stark and unflinching portrayal of life in a decaying urban environment.

2831.title: Dog of Flanders, A (1999)
2831.plot_summary: A young boy named Nello lives in a small village in Flanders with his family and their pet dog Patrasche. Nello and Patrasche are inseparable and share a deep bond.
2831.visual_style: The film features a mix of live-action and animation to bring the story to life.

2832.title: Lost Son, The (1999)
2832.plot_summary: A young man struggles to come to terms with his father's death and his own identity.
2832.visual_style: a mix of realistic and stylized cinematography

2833.title: Lucie Aubrac (1997)
2833.plot_summary: Lucie Aubrac is a French Resistance fighter who helps her husband Raymond escape from prison during World War II. She is a strong and determined woman who risks her life to save her loved one.
